narrative:
Columbiana Ex Vill Sd (Columbiana) exempted village school district has 5,931 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 11.7 percentage points.
